summary: AI diligence automation for multifamily lease, vendor, utility, and financial audits.
editor_note: This is deal-room software with the spreadsheet pain left in view. Rely ingests multifamily leases, vendor contracts, utilities, and financial files, then exports source-linked audit tables in under 30 minutes for most reviews. Unlike generic document AI, it bets on one messy asset class and one due-diligence workflow. The open question is whether lenders and operators trust the model when a single bad cell changes a deal.
